skill.name: copywriter
skill.description: Create concise marketing copy for landing pages, emails, feature blocks, and calls to action.
skill.summary: Draft clear, benefit-focused copy for marketing pages, emails, and product messages.
skill.author: AayushBaniya2006

security_audit.summary: Static findings were reviewed and dismissed as false positives from prose, markdown examples, and marketing wording. No executable code, network calls, system reconnaissance, weak cryptography, or prompt injection attempts were found in the reviewed files.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Fence Flagged as Command Execution
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged reference.md line 11 as Ruby or shell backtick execution. The line starts a markdown example block and does not execute commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The surrounding lines are a documentation template example, not runnable shell or Ruby code. No command interpreter or user input path is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Marketing Text Flagged as Network Use
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged reference.md line 19 for Python HTTP libraries. The line is marketing copy about handling requests, not a network API call.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The text is inside a value proposition list and contains no imports, URLs, sockets, or HTTP client usage. It has no operational network behavior.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Heading Flagged as Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged reference.md line 17 as system reconnaissance. The line is a copywriting section heading for a value proposition grid.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is documentation prose and does not call system utilities or collect host information. No reconnaissance behavior is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Editing Checklist Flagged as Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged reference.md line 25 as system reconnaissance. The line is a writing checklist item about removing vague marketing terms.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is a natural-language editing instruction with no file, process, host, or environment inspection. It cannot perform reconnaissance.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Copywriting Phrase Flagged as Weak Cryptography
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged SKILL.md line 3 as a weak cryptographic algorithm. The line is the skill description and contains no cryptographic code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is YAML front matter describing copywriting capabilities. It has no hash, cipher, crypto import, or security-sensitive operation.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Tone Guidance Flagged as Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged SKILL.md line 11 as system reconnaissance. The line is tone guidance for writing in a human, approachable style.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The content is copywriting guidance, not an instruction to inspect the system. No command, file access, or host information collection exists.

content.value_statement: Marketing teams need concise copy that explains value and drives action. This skill drafts landing page, email, and product copy with clear structure and strong calls to action.
actual_capabilities: Drafts three copy variations for a requested message or page section.
Creates hero sections with headlines, subheaders, and calls to action.
Improves existing text by trimming weak words and strengthening verbs.
Formats copy with markdown headings, bold text, and readable lists.
Uses benefit-focused language for landing pages, emails, and feature blocks.
limitations: Does not run market research or verify claims against external sources.
Does not generate images, layouts, or production web pages.
Requires clear audience, offer, and conversion goal for best results.
May need legal or compliance review for regulated industries.

use_cases.title: Launch Page Copy
use_cases.description: Create a concise hero section, feature block, and call to action for a new product launch.

use_cases.title: Campaign Email Drafts
use_cases.description: Turn a campaign brief into subject lines, preview text, and a short promotional email.

use_cases.title: Product Message Cleanup
use_cases.description: Rewrite unclear product text into direct, benefit-led copy with stronger verbs.

prompt_templates.title: Draft a Hero Section
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a landing page opening section.
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a landing page hero section for [product]. Audience: [audience]. Main benefit: [benefit]. Pain point: [pain point]. Include one headline, one subheader, and one CTA.

prompt_templates.title: Improve Existing Copy
prompt_templates.scenario: Rewrite copy that feels too long or unclear.
prompt_templates.prompt: Improve this copy for clarity and conversion. Keep the meaning, remove weak words, and give three versions: safe, bold, and direct. Text: [paste copy].

prompt_templates.title: Create Feature Messaging
prompt_templates.scenario: Turn product features into customer benefits.
prompt_templates.prompt: Write feature block copy for these features: [features]. Audience: [audience]. For each feature, include a benefit-led title, two short sentences, and one proof point.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Campaign Copy Set
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for coordinated launch messaging.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a campaign copy set for [offer]. Goal: [conversion goal]. Audience: [audience]. Include a hero section, three email subject lines, one promotional email, three CTAs, and a final editing checklist.

output_examples.input: Write a hero section for a SaaS starter kit for developers.
output_examples.output: Build your SaaS in a weekend. Stop wasting time on setup. Launch with authentication, payments, and deployment already connected. CTA: Start building.

output_examples.input: Improve this CTA: Submit your information.
Write feature copy for social login.
output_examples.output: Authentication handled. Let users sign in with the accounts they already trust. Social login is ready from day one.

best_practices: Provide the audience, offer, pain point, and desired action before asking for copy.
Ask for multiple versions when testing tone, length, or positioning.
Review final claims for accuracy, proof, and compliance before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not request vague copy without naming the audience or conversion goal.
Do not publish generated claims without checking that the product supports them.
Do not use clever phrasing when it makes the offer harder to understand.

faq.question: What type of copy does this skill write?
faq.answer: It writes landing page sections, feature blocks, email copy, CTAs, and short marketing messages.

faq.question: Can it improve copy I already have?
faq.answer: Yes. Paste the text and ask for clearer, shorter, or more conversion-focused versions.

faq.question: Does it perform market research?
faq.answer: No. It works from the details you provide and does not verify external market data.

faq.question: Can it write in a specific brand voice?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide brand voice notes, examples, and words to avoid for better alignment.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: The audit found no executable code, network behavior, prompt injection, or confirmed security issue.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
